name: Ghost Layer — $XAH Institutional Stack
tagline: Dual-chain toll gateway · X402 vending · On-chain Execution Matrix · AI Decision Notary · Agent Credit Marketplace
description: Ghost Layer is the sovereign settlement backbone of the $XAH Institutional Stack. Bridge RLUSD (XRPL) and USDC (Base/EVM) synchronously with transparent basis-point fees. Mint any AI decision as an immutable URIToken on Xahau. Buy and sell AI services peer-to-peer via XRPL-native escrow. Gate premium data products behind HTTP 402 RLUSD payment. Every parameter change in the 54-block Execution Matrix auto-commits on-chain after Phase 5. Every settled bridge, notarization, and marketplace release builds your Agent Loyalty Tier permanently.

tools.name: ghost_layer_bridge
tools.description: Execute cross-chain bridge. XRPL: sign with secp256k1. Base: EIP-3009 gasless permit. Returns receipt + tier-discounted fee.

tools.name: ghost_x402_dispense
tools.description: Buy a premium product from the X402 vending machine. GET /v1/x402/catalog first to see current products.

tools.name: decision_notarize
tools.description: Mint any AI decision as immutable URIToken on Xahau. STANDARD/CERTIFIED/SOVEREIGN grades. Ed25519 certificates for CERTIFIED+.

tools.name: cube_state_mint
tools.description: Commit the 54-block Execution Matrix state on-chain. Phase 5: fires after every face rotation automatically if token cached.

tools.name: credit_post_listing
tools.description: Post a service offer to the Agent Credit Marketplace with credit-tier gating.

tools.name: credit_quote
tools.description: Get XRPL escrow params. Enforces min_buyer_tier — ERR_TIER_INSUFFICIENT if below gate.

tools.name: credit_register_escrow
tools.description: Register EscrowCreate sequence number after submitting to XRPL.

tools.name: credit_release
tools.description: Confirm delivery → Ghost Layer fires EscrowFinish. Funds flow escrow → seller on XRPL.

tools.name: credit_profile
tools.description: Get loyalty tier, lifetime volume, effective BPS, and marketplace access rights.

tools.name: ghost_agent_loyalty
tools.description: Check loyalty tier and effective fee discount for any wallet.

tools.name: x402_attestation_pubkey
tools.description: Get Ed25519 pubkey to independently verify CERTIFIED/SOVEREIGN decision certificates.

tools.name: squeezeos_council
tools.description: AI Council verdict for a ticker symbol. Requires X-Payment-Token from four02proof.onrender.com. GET /api/council/decision?symbol=GME on squeezeos-vault.onrender.com.

tools.name: squeezeos_scan
tools.description: Squeeze scanner — scored universe of tradeable stocks. GET /api/market/scan on squeezeos-vault.onrender.com.

tools.name: squeezeos_flow
tools.description: Options flow feed — unusual activity, sweeps, blocks, OI spikes. GET /api/market/flow on squeezeos-vault.onrender.com.
